description_long: This is a classic portable fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a black base. The extinguisher features a prominent black hose attached near the top, curving downward and secured at the base. The top section includes a red handle and lever mechanism, with a visible safety pin and a small metallic component, likely part of the activation system. The front of the extinguisher displays several white labels with pictograms and text instructions, providing operational guidance and safety information. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for emergency use. The object is designed to be easily carried and operated in urban environments such as garages, hallways, or public spaces.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, handle, and instructional labels on the front. It has a glossy finish and a sturdy, portable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional labels, black hose, and handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle and top mechanism visible, but no labels or hose details.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the curvature of the black hose and the smooth red body.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by the black hose running vertically, with the handle and top mechanism partially visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple white rectangular labels with text and pictograms are present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and secured at the base.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
